evidence_quotes:
global.css: '.steps' / '.step.active' / '.step.completed' — Checkout.tsx renders
= 1 ? ' active' : ''}${step > 1 ? ' completed' : ''}`}>1. Select Member
... 2. Select Book ... 3. Confirm, with Back buttons ('') and a confirm step before handleSubmit
BookList.tsx:86-90: 'No books in the catalog yet.' / 'Click "Add Book" to add the first one.' inside .empty-state — empty state explains the page and points to primary action

Modal.tsx:13-18 + 26-28: ESC handler ('if (e.key === "Escape") onCancel();') and overlay click close ('if (e.target === overlayRef.current) onCancel();'); useEffect autofocuses '[data-autofocus]' but no focus trap and no focus return to trigger

global.css: '.form-group label { display: block; ... font-weight: 500 }' and BookList.tsx forms use '<label htmlFor="book-title">Title</label><input id="book-title" name="title" required />' — every input has a real label
Checkout.tsx:149-158: specific inline messages 'Member is suspended.', 'Outstanding fines exceed $5.00 limit.', 'Loan limit reached (5 active loans maximum).' — not generic

Layout.tsx: <nav> with brand + Books / Members / Checkout NavLinks; consistent header on every page; global.css sets a single primary green token (--color-primary: #1a5632) and one type scale (h1 1.75rem, h2 1.35rem)
BookDetail.tsx:63-66: 'All copies on loan{book.reservation_queue_depth > 0 && ` — ${book.reservation_queue_depth} waiting`}' — one polished microcopy moment

Checkout.tsx:155: '{maxLoans &&
This is the member's 5th active loan.
}' — surfaces non-obvious info at confirm step
parsed.anchor_rejected_above: Level 4 ('Polished') requires multiple specific upgrades on top of level 3, and most are missing: (a) Reservation countdown is rendered as a raw timestamp — MemberDetail.tsx:164 'Notification expires {new Date(res.expires_at).toLocaleString()}' — not a live HH:MM:SS countdown; no setInterval/countdown logic exists in the frontend. (b) No secondary affordance (sort/filter/search) on the catalog — BookList.tsx contains only a 'highlight' query param and an Add Book toggle, no filter/sort UI. (c) Confirm-destructive actions do not use a distinct danger treatment — ConfirmReturnModal.tsx:16 uses '' (same primary green as non-destructive confirms). (d) Overdue/notified/unpaid states are emphasized only via colored badges, no icons (e.g., MemberDetail.tsx:124 just 'Overdue'). One polished microcopy line and one 5th-loan warning are present, but the bulk of level-4 anchors are not met, so the project sits at competent.
